markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content progress, address legal feedback, and plan for the next sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Legal Feedback Blocks Content:** Legal review requires citations for all stats and customer claims in comparison articles. This is blocking the publication of 5 key bottom-of-funnel (BoFu) listicles.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**BoFu Content Is a Priority:** The strategy will shift to a 50/50 Top-of-Funnel (ToFu)/BoFu mix to drive conversions, a key metric for Nima.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [**Early SEO Signals Are Positive:** New articles are indexing and ranking quickly (e.g., "Booking Travel for Executives" on page 1/2), and are already being cited by LLMs like ChatGPT and Perplexity.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [**Author Strategy Needed:** A formal author strategy is required to boost content authority. Options include using internal experts or GrowthX reviewers.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Pipeline

  - [**Published:** 5 new blog posts delivered last Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Ready for Review:** 5 more posts are ready for final review.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**In Progress:** 5 AI-focused articles are being written this week, including a refresh of the existing AI travel agent post.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)

### Legal Review & BoFu Content Strategy

  - [**Blocker:** Legal review is delaying 5 BoFu listicles.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Requirement:** All stats and customer claims must be cited.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
      - [**Source Policy:** Moran confirmed no direct competitor links; use high-authority sources (G2, Capterra) with nofollow links.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Remove the "Considerations" section from comparison articles to simplify the legal review process.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift:** The content mix will become 50% ToFu / 50% BoFu to drive conversions, a key metric for Nima.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)

### Author Strategy for Authority

  - [**Problem:** Articles published under a generic "Navan editorial team" author lack authority.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [**Proposed Solutions:**](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [**Internal Experts:** Use product marketing or other internal experts.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1443.0)
          - [**Risk:** Could create review bottlenecks and slow the publishing cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1496.0)
      - [**GrowthX Reviewers:** Use Rich or Libby as authors.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
          - [**Benefit:** Provides a real person's byline, which is better than a generic team.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
      - [**External Experts:** Hire domain experts to serve as authors.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [**Decision:** GrowthX will research and propose a formal author strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)

### Performance & Sprint Review

  - [**Organic Traffic:** Week-over-week traffic is growing.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [**Key Performer:** "Booking Travel for Executives" is ranking on page 1/2 for its keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=769.0)
  - [**LLM Citations:** Articles are already being cited by AI platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [**Perplexity:** Citing "Booking Travel for Executives."](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [**ChatGPT:** Citing "Employers Union of Care" and "Booking Travel for Executives."](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [**Sprint Review:** Aida will share a Phase 1 summary document to help Navan decide on continuing the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Organic content builds a durable asset to reduce long-term paid search dependency.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
      - [**Deadline:** Navan to confirm intent to continue by **Feb 2nd**.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Libby & Moran:** Sync to finalize the legal review process and citation requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Rich & Libby:** Catch up on the content review backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [**Aida:**](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [Propose a formal author strategy to Navan.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
      - [Share the Phase 1 summary document and Airtable link in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [**All:** Meet next week, then switch to a bi-weekly cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/8kw1h43wzWaMc4kj48apsEkwnhm4s_-g?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
